spec.name: execute_node
spec.description: Execute Node.js code and return stdout/stderr
spec.implementation_notes: Run: node -e <code> . Node.js has built-in zlib via require('zlib') and fs via require('fs').

request.rationale: I need to perform zlib compression on file data and write hex output. No existing tool can do binary compression. Node.js has built-in zlib support and is commonly installed on Windows dev machines (unlike Python which returned exit code 9009).
